compressed_prompt: Write acoustic song Korean peninsula no commas
response:
Here’s an acoustic song about the Korean Peninsula without commas:

**"Two Rivers One Land"**

Soft strum on the guitar slow
Mountains whisper tales of old
Same blood flows through Seoul and Pyongyang
Same stars shine on both the sand

Two rivers one land divided
Same dreams buried deep inside
Children play in different playgrounds
But their laughter sounds the same light

Generations wait for morning
When the walls will fade to dust
No more lines drawn in the darkness
Just the wind through fields of trust

Soft strum on the guitar slow
Echoes of a song untold
Same heart beats beneath the silence
Same hope waits to break the cold
